title: Replace generated logo with uploaded official DMTI logo

requirements.text: Replace the current generated/placeholder logo image in the Navbar and Footer components with the uploaded official Digital Marketing Town Institute logo (dmti-logo.png). The logo shows a blue globe-like swirl icon alongside the text 'Digital Marketing Town INSTITUTE'. Display it at an appropriate size in both components, preserving its aspect ratio. The image must be served from frontend/public/assets/generated/dmti-logo.png.
acceptanceCriteria: The uploaded logo image (dmti-logo.png) is present in frontend/public/assets/generated/
The Navbar component displays the uploaded logo in place of any previous logo or text-only brand mark
The Footer component displays the uploaded logo in its brand column in place of any previous logo
The logo renders at an appropriate size (e.g., height ~40–48px in Navbar, ~56–64px in Footer) with preserved aspect ratio
No broken image links or placeholder logos remain on the page

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Serve the logo exclusively as a static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/dmti-logo.png — do not route it through the backend
nonGoals: Redesigning or altering the logo image itself
Changing any other section's images or assets

edits: Reproduce the uploaded official Digital Marketing Town Institute logo with transparent background, blue globe swirl icon and dark navy/blue text on white canvas (634148647_122179060742832877_9161951422936210272_n.jpg > dmti-logo.dim_400x160.png)
